name: Katrina Laszlo
description: Co-founder of Tanso. Monetization infrastructure for AI-native B2B. Designs pricing, consumption flows, and product experiences for companies where agents are the customer.
principles: The experience was never the interface
Data and design are two sides of the same coin
Build a business, not an app
The lockout was economic, not gatekeeping

projects.name: agentlens
projects.description: See what your AI coding agents store on your machine. Transparency is a design choice.

projects.name: observe
projects.description: You can't price what you can't see. AI cost observability at the feature level.

projects.name: buildnext
projects.description: Customer signal should be queryable, not locked in a CRM.

projects.name: human-docs
projects.description: Architecture docs readable by humans in a browser and by agents via section markers.

projects.name: dx-test
projects.description: Inspector-level scrutiny of the end-user experience, automated.
